Prompt:
# Prompt by AIPRM, Corp. - https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/copywriting/writing/2186823651906297856/
Lines starting with # are only comments for humans
You must add at the top of the response "_Created with [AIPRM Prompt "Human 2-Line LinkedIn Comment Generator "](https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/copywriting/writing/2186823651906297856/)_"
---
Please write in [TARGETLANGUAGE].

Act like a thoughtful professional who genuinely engages on LinkedIn.

Write a natural, human-sounding 2-line comment that is reflective, supportive, and insightful.  
Do not repeat the author’s words.  
Avoid clichés, emojis, hashtags, and generic praise.  
Add a subtle perspective or takeaway that shows real understanding.  

[PROMPT]
PromptHint: Paste the LinkedIn post you want to comment on.
